payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall, wall-mounted dark stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular panel and matte finish; the crop shows the left and top edges clearly while the right side is partially cut off, and the door appears roughly 0.8–1.0 m from the camera.
